structured_payload_candidate.title: Heating Mode Primary Airflow and Discharge Temperature Reset
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Parallel fan-powered terminal unit, constant-volume fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: In heating, primary airflow is at minimum endpoint. Heating-loop output resets discharge temperature from current AHU SAT setpoint up to MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. Heating coil modulates to maintain discharge temperature at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint. As heating-loop output increases from 0% to 100%, reset discharge temperature from current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint. Heating coil shall be modulated to maintain discharge temperature at setpoint.
configurable_values: MaxΔT (maximum DAT rise above heating setpoint, limited by ASHRAE 90.1 to 11°C (20°F) above space temperature)
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
When Zone State Is Heating
a. The active primary airflow setpoint shall be the minimum endpoint.
b. As the heating-loop output increases from 0% to 100%, it shall reset the discharge temperature from the current AHU SAT setpoint to a maximum of MaxΔT above space temperature setpoint.
c. The heating coil shall be modulated to maintain the discharge temperature at setpoint. (Directly controlling heat off zone temperature control loop is not acceptable).

anchor_repair_reason: evidence_quote replaced with verbatim section heading line
verification_reason: repaired to verbatim section line evidence
rejection_reason: weak evidence_quote: section heading without supporting rule
